sourceOverview.notes: On-device STT (no cloud). Cheetah/Leopard engines. Privacy-first, edge deployment.

audit.priceRangeSummary: On-device SDK pricing/plans vary by product and deployment.
audit.limitsSummary: Offline/edge deployment; device constraints matter more than cloud file-size quotas. Language coverage is narrower than cloud hyperscalers.
audit.regionSummary: Not applicable for on-device inference; processing stays on device unless you wrap it yourself.
audit.ttsLanguagesSummary: English, French, German, Italian, Japanese, Korean, Portuguese, Spanish.
audit.sttLanguagesSummary: Cheetah/Cheetah Fast languages include English, French, German, Italian, Portuguese, Spanish.
audit.freeTierSummary: Evaluation/free developer access exists for many SDKs.
audit.appIntegrationNotes: Your sheet is outdated: Picovoice is now LLM + TTS + STT on-device. This is strategically important if privacy/offline mode matters.

supplementalResearch.title: 53. Picovoice (Canada) — STT ✓ TTS ✓
supplementalResearch.markdown:
### 53. Picovoice (Canada) — STT ✓ TTS ✓

**Status:** Active. **100% on-device** — no cloud processing whatsoever.

**Cheetah** (streaming STT), **Leopard** (batch STT), **Orca** (TTS). **8 languages** (en, fr, de, it, ja, ko, pt, es). Free plan: 250 min STT/month + 100K chars TTS/month. Foundation: $6,000/year. Enterprise: $30,000/year. Annual contracts only. Cross-platform SDKs. **Inherently HIPAA/GDPR compliant** (no data leaves device). Models <20MB footprint.
